creator: josh@hewbert.com
text:
flz wrote:
Can you try to do these: 
- Simple rebuild the port, test. - Change XORG_VERSION to 7.0.0 in 
Makefile, rebuild, test. - Add the following to /etc/libmap.conf, test. 
[/usr/local/lib/xorg/modules/drivers/mga_drv.so] libc.so.6 
/compat/linux/lib/libc.so.6

None of the above has worked.  This is on 7.0-RELEASE as well.
